testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 10 from iteration 99 (migration 020 with RLS + new templates table + shared types/client modified). Performance cadence trigger at iteration 100 (every 20th starting at 20).

suite_details.regression-baseline-full: Full regression across all phases (0-4). Verify: canvas render, step/section CRUD, journey canvas, perspectives, annotations, comments, tasks, runbooks, playbook, activity log, workspace clone, coloring rules. Minimum 40 checks. Include API auth guard probing.
suite_details.feat-052-data-integrity: Verify FEAT-052 [1/2] data layer integrity: migration 020 SQL correctness, RLS policy references can_access_workspace(), Template types match migration columns, API route envelope pattern (GET/POST/DELETE/deploy), client wrapper signatures match routes, STARTER_TEMPLATES constant structure, deploy route UUID remapping logic, step_role name-matching on deploy.
suite_details.performance-static-audit: Static performance analysis (cadence trigger). Check: (1) Component file sizes — flag any >500 lines, (2) Missing useCallback/useMemo on handlers passed as props, (3) Unnecessary re-renders from inline object/array literals in JSX props, (4) Client-side data fetching patterns — any over-fetching or N+1 patterns, (5) Import graph — any circular dependencies or heavy deps loaded eagerly, (6) Canvas node rendering efficiency — memoization on custom nodes.

warnings_added: Risk score 10 from iter 99 — testing mandatory before FEAT-052 [2/2]
Accessibility cadence still severely overdue (79 iterations since last audit at iter 21)
